guardrails.nextHumanAction: Open each candidate, verify facts and risk language, then run mark:review with --confirm-human for approved files.
guardrails.publishLimitRecommendation: After review, publish only 1-3 articles per batch.

filters.blockedPattern: 保证赚钱|自动群发客户|自动群发|绕过平台规则|站外付款|规避平台规则|无风险|这篇文章默认是草稿|发布前必须补齐|脚本生成的原创草稿|这篇草稿默认是 draft|脚本生成原创草稿
filters.sortStrategy: opportunityScore desc, publishBatch desc, qualityScore desc, slug asc
